name: Joe Dodge
abstract: Joseph George Dodge (February 9, 1922 – August 18, 2004) was an American jazz musician. A subtle and creative drummer, Dodge will probably always be better known for his role primarily as a timekeeper and accompanist who set a standard for blending propulsive swing, creating an adaptability that allowed him to remain in the background an…

about_quotes.speaker: Brubeck
about_quotes.evidence: when Dave talked to Joe about joining the group... if we really want to hit like a new plateau, it wouldn’t hurt us to have a killer drummer.
